channel.title: mkiatipis TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from mkiatipis

item.title: Shoutout to @State Farm for helping me give back to my community! Visit https://st.fm/4tKftq7 for a chance to secure a brand-new net for your court, while supplies last. Check with your local Parks department before hanging. #StateFarmPartner #RedNets
item.description: Shoutout to @State Farm for helping me give back to my community! Visit https://st.fm/4tKftq7 for a chance to secure a brand-new net for your court, while supplies last. Check with your local Parks department before hanging. #StateFarmPartner #RedNets
